title: uva-ursi mariposa
intro: Uva-ursi mariposa, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, shrub-like plant native to North America, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and red berries. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate urinary tract infections, soothe digestive issues, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of uva-ursi mariposa include its ability to support kidney health, prevent bladder infections, and act as a natural diuretic. Uva-ursi mariposa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
